Interface IRasterValue

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control raster value.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("6B2D0243-7100-4E3F-AA02-5EC12DAF6980")]
public interface IRasterValue

Properties

Extent

The extent of the raster value.

IEnvelope Extent { get; set; }

IEnvelope
